name: Loanmax Title Loans
description_short: Glendale, AZ location of Loanmax Title Loans offering fast title loans and payday loans at 4359 W Bethany Home Rd.
description_long:
Loanmax Title Loans in Glendale, AZ is located at 4359 W Bethany Home Rd, operating as a standalone storefront in the city. The Glendale store is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM, and closed on Sundays.

This Glendale location offers title loans on vehicles and payday loans for short-term credit needs. Reach the team at 623-931-3052 to learn about your eligibility and start the application process.

For Glendale residents facing unexpected expenses, this W Bethany Home Rd storefront is a straightforward option. Bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title (for title loans), and the staff will help you move forward with your application.
address: 4359 W Bethany Home Rd, Glendale, AZ 85301

tiers.name: Auto Title Loan
features: Loans up to $10,000 based on vehicle value
No credit check — all credit types accepted
Borrower retains and drives vehicle during repayment
Online pre-qualification with in-store closing required

pros: Founded in 1990 — over 35 years of title lending experience
Loans funded in 20 minutes or less with same-day cash disbursement
No credit check required — accepts all credit types including no credit
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the repayment period
Mobile app available for balance checks, payment scheduling, and due-date tracking
~194 locations across 20+ states — broad national physical access
Online pre-qualification available before visiting a branch
cons: Multiple BBB locations hold F ratings — Houston (93 complaints) and Nevada (90 complaints) have unresolved cases on file
Not BBB accredited despite decades in operation
APR can reach triple digits in some states — South Carolina rates cited near 372% APR
In-person branch visit required to finalize any loan — no fully online process
Vehicle repossession is a real risk on default, as the title is held as collateral
best_for: Vehicle owners with a lien-free title who need emergency cash same-day
Borrowers with poor or no credit who have been declined by banks and credit unions
Consumers who need more than $500 but cannot qualify for a traditional personal loan
Short-term borrowers with a concrete plan to repay quickly and avoid compounding interest
diagnosis: LoanMax is best suited for vehicle-owning consumers in a genuine short-term cash emergency who have exhausted lower-cost borrowing options and own their car outright. The core caveat is cost: APRs are high, BBB complaint records at multiple locations are poor, and the collateral risk (vehicle repossession) is real — this is an expensive last resort, not a general-purpose lending solution.
services: Auto title loans secured by vehicle title
Vehicle title assessment and loan valuation
Loan account servicing and customer support
meta_description: Glendale, AZ - Loanmax Title Loans at 4359 W Bethany Home Rd. Fast title and payday loans.
